source_pr.title: executor: enable race test for analyzetest and memtest
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #xxx

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory

Documentation

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Goroutine leak / insufficient cleanup in test main: OpenCensus stats `view` needs to be stopped to satisfy goleak.
failure_signature: goleak detects leaked goroutines (OpenCensus stats `view`) when running executor tests.
root_cause_explanation: The executor test suite's `TestMain` uses goleak to detect leftover goroutines, but OpenCensus stats `view` can keep background goroutines running if not stopped. The patch adds a `goleak.Cleanup` hook to call `view.Stop()` so the global background goroutines are cleaned up and the test suite no longer flakes due to goroutine leaks.
fix_pattern: Add goleak cleanup to stop OpenCensus stats view (`view.Stop()`) in `TestMain` to avoid goroutine leaks.

evidence: evidence: executor: enable race test for analyzetest and memtest

files: DEPS.bzl, executor/BUILD.bazel, executor/analyzetest/BUILD.bazel, executor/memtest/BUILD.bazel, executor/simpletest/BUILD.bazel, executor/tiflashtest/BUILD.bazel, executor/tiflashtest/main_test.go, executor/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go, go.mod, go.sum
